'''''Young Jedi Knights: The Fall of the Diversity Alliance''''' is a compilation published by the [[Science Fiction Book Club]] of the seventh book through to the eleventh book of the [[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights]] series:

*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''
